---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Why?**
What problem does this solve or what use case does it enable?

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've thought of.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, links to similar features in other apps, etc.
